title: Femboy Cards
description:
Anime Femboy Collectible Trading Cards with trading system, with 64+ custom images and 5 packs with common, rare, epic, legendary rarities
Fork
body:
## COLLECTIBLE FEMBOY TRADING CARDS 

**Earn, unlock, and trade unique cards with other players**

**::FEATURES::**
- 64 unique cards of different ratirites: from Common to Legendary
- Player-to-player trading system via simple commands
- Card packs by rarity: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary + Random Packs
- Special villager selling exclusive items
  
_(Now in Beta)_

**::TRADING COMMANDS::**

Send trade offer:

Example: /tradecard Player123 femboy1(your item) femboy2(other player item) (F3+H to view item tag)

Accept trade offer:

/tradecard accept

View all cards & info:

/tradecard list 

View trade history:

/tradecard history

View your profile / stats:

/tradecard profile


- Fork from **Curseforge** version https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/femboycards

(screenshots - sm6gm1ch, artwork femboycard)
